text: The mist thickened, obscuring Chloe Castillo's view of the exits. As Chloe Castillo finally broke free from Chloe Castillo's paralysis and started to run, Chloe Castillo heard a chorus of whispers rising from the very boards beneath Chloe Castillo's feet. The parkour workshop had turned into a nightmare, and Chloe Castillo realized with growing terror that Chloe Castillo's skills might be the only thing keeping Chloe Castillo alive in this suddenly hostile urban oasis.
context: This chunk describes the escalating supernatural events at the parkour workshop, as the park's features come to life and Chloe realizes she must use her skills to survive.
